evals.prompt: 帮我搭一个带用户登录、文件上传和后台管理页的全栈应用，前端 React，后端 Node.js。
evals.expected_output: Skill should choose a full-stack architecture path, explicitly cover auth, upload flow, backend structure, and frontend-backend integration.
expectations: The output treats the work as a full-stack app rather than frontend-only work.
The plan addresses auth, upload handling, and service boundaries.
The output includes both server-side and browser-facing architecture decisions.

evals.prompt: 我想做一个带实时通知的工单系统，前后端一起搭，最好一开始就按可上线的结构来。
evals.expected_output: Skill should cover full-stack architecture with real-time strategy, production hardening, and integration boundaries.
expectations: The output includes a real-time method choice such as SSE or WebSocket.
The output includes production-hardening concerns, not only coding steps.
The output keeps the problem in fullstack-dev rather than only React or only API design.

evals.prompt: 把这个现有 Next.js 前台和 Python API 服务重新整理成更清晰的全栈架构，顺便补错误处理和配置管理。
evals.expected_output: Skill should identify refactor / architecture cleanup work across frontend and backend, including config, error handling, and system boundaries.
expectations: The output frames this as refactoring an existing full-stack system.
The plan covers configuration, error handling, and module boundaries.
The output does not limit itself to visual frontend changes only.
